query:
INSERT INTO users (email, name, role, openId, loginMethod, lastSignedIn, createdAt, updatedAt) 
VALUES (
  'admin@holambra.com',
  'Admin CMS',
  'admin',
  CONCAT('cms_admin_', UUID()),
  'cms',
  NOW(),
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);
